title: tmesipteris elongata
intro: Tmesipteris elongata, also known as the club moss or Queensland club moss, is a species of fern-like plant that belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tmesipteris elongata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
